records.question: Which departments are located in Linderman with a budget of at most 601283.6, where instructor Desyl earns exactly 48803.38 and student Porter has at most 111 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Porter' AND instructor.salary = 48803.38 AND department.building = 'Linderman' AND department.budget <= 601283.6 AND instructor.name = 'Desyl' AND student.tot_cred <= 111
records.pred_sql: select department.dept_name from department join instructor on department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name join student on department.dept_name = student.dept_name where department.building = 'Linderman' and department.budget <= 601283.6 and instructor.name like '%desyl%' and instructor.salary = 48803.38 and student.name like '%porter%' and student.tot_cred <= 111 limit 5
records.thought: We need to find departments in Linderman with budget ≤ 601283.6 that have an instructor named Desyl earning exactly 48803.38 and a student named Porter with ≤ 111 total credits. We'll join department with instructor and student tables, applying the specified filters.
